primary_actions.reasoning: The RAN has the highest contribution (80.6%) to the DDoS prediction, indicating that it is the primary source of the attack traffic. Implementing rate limiting here will help control the flow of requests and prevent overwhelming the network.

supporting_actions.reasoning: The Edge tier has a significant contribution (16.8%) to the DDoS attack. Traffic scrubbing at this level will further filter out malicious traffic that has passed through the RAN, enhancing the overall mitigation strategy.

without_rag.reasoning: Given the predicted DDOS attack with 100% confidence, immediate and comprehensive actions are necessary to mitigate the impact. The selected actions are all relevant to DDOS mitigation and are prioritized to handle the severity of the threat.
